generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired NATO strategist, I've seen firsthand how our allies take advantage of our goodwill. We carry the burden while others free-ride. It's time to put America first and demand real commitment from our partners. Our security shouldn't be a charity case. #StrongAlliances #AmericaFirst
